steps.title: Match the profit structure
steps.content:
The problem says profit is monthly sales revenue minus fixed monthly costs. The equation has that form:
$$18{,}000=3.50x-5{,}250$$

steps.title: Interpret the revenue term
steps.content: The fixed cost is $5{,}250$, so the term before subtracting fixed costs, $3.50x$, represents monthly sales revenue from selling $x$ phone stands. The answer is A.
